revision.comment: わたつみ神社をまとめてみる
revision.text:
'''海神社'''・'''海神神社'''（わたつみじんじゃ） *[[海神社]] -- 兵庫県神戸市垂水区。式内名神大社、旧官幣中社 *[[海神社 (紀の川市)]] -- 和歌山県紀の川市。旧郷社 *[[海神神社]] -- 長崎県対島市。旧国幣中社 *[[和多都見神社]] -- 長崎県対島市。式内名神大社、旧村社 *[[海童神社]] -- 佐賀県佐賀郡川副町。旧郷社 *[[海都見神社]] -- 高知県高岡郡檮原町。旧郷社 *[[綿津見神社]] **福島県相馬郡飯舘村。旧郷社 **福島県原町市。旧郷社 **福岡県北九州市小倉南区。旧郷社 *[[海積神社]] -- 愛知県岡崎市。旧村社
{{aimai}}

'''海神社'''（あまじんじゃ・かいじんじゃ・わたつみじんじゃ） *[[海神社]] -- 兵庫県神戸市垂水区。式内名神大社、旧官幣中社 *[[海神社 (豊岡市)]] -- 兵庫県豊岡市。式内名神大社、旧村社 *[[海神社 (紀の川市)]] -- 和歌山県紀の川市。旧郷社 *[[海神社 (西ノ島町)]] -- 島根県西ノ島町。式内小社、旧村社 *[[海神社 (壱岐市)]] -- 長崎県壱岐市。式内大社、旧村社
その他、'''海神神社'''・'''綿津見神社'''（わたつみじんじゃ）など *[[綿津見神社]] **福島県相馬郡飯舘村。旧郷社 **福島県原町市。旧郷社 **福岡県北九州市小倉南区。旧郷社 *[[海積神社]] -- 愛知県岡崎市。旧村社 *[[海都見神社]] -- 高知県高岡郡檮原町。旧郷社 *[[海童神社]] -- 佐賀県佐賀郡川副町。旧郷社 *[[海神神社]] -- 長崎県対馬市。旧国幣中社 *[[和多都美神社]] -- 長崎県対馬市。式内名神大社、旧村社
{{曖昧さ回避}}
{{デフォルトソート:かい}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

'''Kaijin Shrine''' (海神社, also read as Amajinja, Kaijinja, or Watatsumijinja) refers to various [[Shrine|Shinto shrines]]:
* {{ill|Kaijin Shrine (Kobe)|ja|海神社 (神戸市)}} - Located in {{ill|Tarumi-ku, Kobe|ja|垂水区}}, [[Kobe]], [[Hyōgo Prefecture]]. It is a {{ill|Myōjin Taisha|ja|名神大社|lt=Shikinaisha Myōjin Taisha}} and a former {{ill|Kanpeichūsha|ja|官幣中社}}. * {{ill|Kaijin Shrine (Toyooka)|ja|海神社 (豊岡市)}} - Located in [[Toyooka, Hyōgo|Toyooka City]], Hyōgo Prefecture. It is a Shikinaisha Myōjin Taisha and a former {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社|lt=Sonsha}}. * {{ill|Kaijin Shrine (Kinokawa)|ja|海神社 (紀の川市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kinokawa, Wakayama|ja|紀の川市}}, [[Wakayama Prefecture]]. It is a former {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社|lt=Kensha}}. * {{ill|Kaijin Shrine (Nishinoshima)|ja|海神社 (西ノ島町)}} - Located in {{ill|Nishinoshima, Shimane|ja|西ノ島町}}, [[Oki District]], [[Shimane Prefecture]]. It is a Shikinaisha Shōsha (minor shrine) and a former Village Shrine. * {{ill|Kaijin Shrine (Iki)|ja|海神社 (壱岐市)}} - Located in [[Iki, Nagasaki|Iki City]], [[Nagasaki Prefecture]]. It is a Shikinaisha Taisha and a former Village Shrine.
== Related Articles == There are also shrines with similar names, such as '''Kaijin Shrine''' and '''Watatsumi Shrine''' (綿津見神社, Watatsumijinja). * {{ill|Watatsumi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|綿津見神社 (曖昧さ回避)}} * {{ill|Kaizumi Shrine|ja|海積神社}} - Located in {{ill|Okazaki, Aichi|ja|岡崎市}}, [[Aichi Prefecture]]. Former Village Shrine. * {{ill|Kaitomi Shrine|ja|海都見神社}} - Located in {{ill|Yusuhara, Kōchi|ja|檮原町}}, [[Takaoka District, Kōchi|Takaoka District]], [[Kōchi Prefecture]]. Former Gōsha (district shrine). * {{ill|Kaido Shrine|ja|海童神社}} - Located in {{ill|Kawasoemachi|ja|川副町}}, [[Saga District, Saga|Saga District]], [[Saga Prefecture]]. Former Gōsha. * {{ill|Kaijin Shrine (Tsushima)|ja|海神神社}} - Located in [[Tsushima, Nagasaki|Tsushima City]], Nagasaki Prefecture. Former {{ill|Kokuhei Chūsha|ja|国幣中社}}. * {{ill|Watatsumi Shrine (Tsushima)|ja|和多都美神社}} - Located in Tsushima City, Nagasaki Prefecture. It is a Shikinaisha Myōjin Taisha and a former Village Shrine.
{{Disambiguation}}
[[Category:Shrines with identical names]] [[Category:Untranslated pages]] [[Category:Untranslated pages]] [[ja:海神社]]

It is a {{ill|Myōjin Taisha|ja|名神大社|lt=Shikinaisha Myōjin Taisha}} and a former {{ill|Kanpeichūsha|ja|官幣中社}}. * {{ill|Kaijin Shrine (Toyooka)|ja|海神社 (豊岡市)}} - Located in [[Toyooka, Hyōgo|Toyooka City]], Hyōgo Prefecture. It is a Shikinaisha Myōjin Taisha and a former {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社|lt=Sonsha}}. * {{ill|Kaijin Shrine (Kinokawa)|ja|海神社 (紀の川市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kinokawa, Wakayama|ja|紀の川市}}, [[Wakayama Prefecture]]. It is a Shikinaisha Taisha and a former Village Shrine.
Watatsumi Shrine can refer to the following
* [[Watatsumi Shrine_(Kobe)|Watatsumi Shrine]] * [[Watazumi Shrine]] sometimes read as Watatsumi Shrine * [[Kaijin Shrine]] sometimes read as Watatsumi Shrine * Another shrine to [[Watatsumi]] {{Disambiguation}}{{Watatsumi and Sumiyoshi Faiths}}

'''Kaijin Shrine''' (海神社, also read as Amajinja, Kaijinja, or Watatsumijinja) refers to various [[Shrine|Shinto shrines]]:
* [[Watatsumi Shrine_(Kobe)|Watatsumi Shrine]] - Located in {{ill|Tarumi-ku, Kobe|ja|垂水区}}, [[Kobe]], [[Hyōgo Prefecture]]. It is a {{ill|Myōjin Taisha|ja|名神大社|lt=Shikinaisha Myōjin Taisha}} and a former {{ill|Kanpeichūsha|ja|官幣中社}}. * {{ill|Kaijin Shrine (Toyooka)|ja|海神社 (豊岡市)}} - Located in [[Toyooka, Hyōgo|Toyooka City]], Hyōgo Prefecture. It is a Shikinaisha Myōjin Taisha and a former {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社|lt=Sonsha}}. * {{ill|Kaijin Shrine (Kinokawa)|ja|海神社 (紀の川市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kinokawa, Wakayama|ja|紀の川市}}, [[Wakayama Prefecture]]. It is a former {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社|lt=Kensha}}. * {{ill|Kaijin Shrine (Nishinoshima)|ja|海神社 (西ノ島町)}} - Located in {{ill|Nishinoshima, Shimane|ja|西ノ島町}}, [[Oki District]], [[Shimane Prefecture]]. It is a Shikinaisha Shōsha (minor shrine) and a former Village Shrine. * {{ill|Kaijin Shrine (Iki)|ja|海神社 (壱岐市)}} - Located in [[Iki, Nagasaki|Iki City]], [[Nagasaki Prefecture]]. It is a Shikinaisha Taisha and a former Village Shrine.
Watatsumi Shrine can refer to the following
* [[Watatsumi Shrine_(Kobe)|Watatsumi Shrine]] * [[Watazumi Shrine]] sometimes read as Watatsumi Shrine * [[Kaijin Shrine]] sometimes read as Watatsumi Shrine * Another shrine to [[Watatsumi]] {{Disambiguation}}{{Watatsumi and Sumiyoshi Faiths}}
== Related Articles == There are also shrines with similar names, such as '''Kaijin Shrine''' and '''Watatsumi Shrine''' (綿津見神社, Watatsumijinja). * {{ill|Watatsumi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|綿津見神社 (曖昧さ回避)}} * {{ill|Kaizumi Shrine|ja|海積神社}} - Located in {{ill|Okazaki, Aichi|ja|岡崎市}}, [[Aichi Prefecture]]. Former Village Shrine. * {{ill|Kaitomi Shrine|ja|海都見神社}} - Located in {{ill|Yusuhara, Kōchi|ja|檮原町}}, [[Takaoka District, Kōchi|Takaoka District]], [[Kōchi Prefecture]]. Former Gōsha (district shrine). * {{ill|Kaido Shrine|ja|海童神社}} - Located in {{ill|Kawasoemachi|ja|川副町}}, [[Saga District, Saga|Saga District]], [[Saga Prefecture]]. Former Gōsha. * {{ill|Kaijin Shrine (Tsushima)|ja|海神神社}} - Located in [[Tsushima, Nagasaki|Tsushima City]], Nagasaki Prefecture. Former {{ill|Kokuhei Chūsha|ja|国幣中社}}. * {{ill|Watatsumi Shrine (Tsushima)|ja|和多都美神社}} - Located in Tsushima City, Nagasaki Prefecture. It is a Shikinaisha Myōjin Taisha and a former Village Shrine.

'''Kaijin Shrine''' (海神社, also read as Amajinja, Kaijinja, or Watatsumijinja) refers to various [[Shrine|Shinto shrines]]:
* [[Watatsumi Shrine_(Kobe)|Watatsumi Shrines]][[Category:shrine disambiguations]] - Located in {{ill|Tarumi-ku, Kobe|ja|垂水区}}, [[Kobe]], [[Hyōgo Prefecture]]. It is a {{ill|Myōjin Taisha|ja|名神大社|lt=Shikinaisha Myōjin Taisha}} and a former {{ill|Kanpeichūsha|ja|官幣中社}}. * {{ill|Kaijin Shrine (Toyooka)|ja|海神社 (豊岡市)}} - Located in [[Toyooka, Hyōgo|Toyooka City]], Hyōgo Prefecture. It is a Shikinaisha Myōjin Taisha and a former {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社|lt=Sonsha}}. * {{ill|Kaijin Shrine (Kinokawa)|ja|海神社 (紀の川市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kinokawa, Wakayama|ja|紀の川市}}, [[Wakayama Prefecture]]. The main shrine of Watatsumi is [[Shikaumi Shrines]][[Category:shrine disambiguations]] the ancestral shrine of the [[Azumi people]]
'''Kaijin Shrine''' (海神社, also read as Amajinja, Kaijinja, or Watatsumijinja) refers to various [[Shrine|Shinto shrines]]:
* [[Watatsumi Shrine_(Kobe)|Watatsumi Shrines]][[Category:shrine disambiguations]] - Located in {{ill|Tarumi-ku, Kobe|ja|垂水区}}, [[Kobe]], [[Hyōgo Prefecture]]. It is a {{ill|Myōjin Taisha|ja|名神大社|lt=Shikinaisha Myōjin Taisha}} and a former {{ill|Kanpeichūsha|ja|官幣中社}}. * {{ill|Kaijin Shrine (Toyooka)|ja|海神社 (豊岡市)}} - Located in [[Toyooka, Hyōgo|Toyooka City]], Hyōgo Prefecture. It is a Shikinaisha Myōjin Taisha and a former {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社|lt=Sonsha}}. * {{ill|Kaijin Shrine (Kinokawa)|ja|海神社 (紀の川市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kinokawa, Wakayama|ja|紀の川市}}, [[Wakayama Prefecture]]. It is a former {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社|lt=Kensha}}. * {{ill|Kaijin Shrine (Nishinoshima)|ja|海神社 (西ノ島町)}} - Located in {{ill|Nishinoshima, Shimane|ja|西ノ島町}}, [[Oki District]], [[Shimane Prefecture]]. It is a Shikinaisha Shōsha (minor shrine) and a former Village Shrine. * {{ill|Kaijin Shrine (Iki)|ja|海神社 (壱岐市)}} - Located in [[Iki, Nagasaki|Iki City]], [[Nagasaki Prefecture]]. It is a Shikinaisha Taisha and a former Village Shrine.
Watatsumi Shrine can refer to the following
* [[Watatsumi Shrine_(Kobe)|Watatsumi Shrines]][[Category:shrine disambiguations]] * [[Watazumi Shrines]][[Category:shrine disambiguations]] sometimes read as Watatsumi Shrine * [[Kaijin Shrines]][[Category:shrine disambiguations]] sometimes read as Watatsumi Shrine * Another shrine to [[Watatsumi]]
== Other shrines ==
* {{ill|Kaido Shrine|ja|海童神社}} - known for its whalebone torii, Located in {{ill|Kawasoemachi|ja|川副町}}, [[Saga District, Saga|Saga District]], [[Saga Prefecture]]. Former Gōsha.
== Related Articles == There are also shrines with similar names, such as '''Kaijin Shrine''' and '''Watatsumi Shrine''' (綿津見神社, Watatsumijinja). * * {{ill|Kaizumi Shrine|ja|海積神社}} - Located in {{ill|Okazaki, Aichi|ja|岡崎市}}, [[Aichi Prefecture]]. Former Village Shrine. * {{ill|Kaitomi Shrine|ja|海都見神社}} - Located in {{ill|Yusuhara, Kōchi|ja|檮原町}}, [[Takaoka District, Kōchi|Takaoka District]], [[Kōchi Prefecture]]. Former Gōsha (district shrine). *

The main shrine of Watatsumi is [[Shikaumi Shrines]][[Category:shrine disambiguations]] the ancestral shrine of the [[Azumi people]]
'''Kaijin Shrine''' (海神社, also read as Amajinja, Kaijinja, or Watatsumijinja) refers to various [[Shrine|Shinto shrines]]:
* [[Watatsumi Shrine_(Kobe)|Watatsumi Shrines]][[Category:shrine disambiguations]] - Located in {{ill|Tarumi-ku, Kobe|ja|垂水区}}, [[Kobe]], [[Hyōgo Prefecture]]. It is a {{ill|Myōjin Taisha|ja|名神大社|lt=Shikinaisha Myōjin Taisha}} and a former {{ill|Kanpeichūsha|ja|官幣中社}}. * {{ill|Kaijin Shrine (Toyooka)|ja|海神社 (豊岡市)}} - Located in [[Toyooka, Hyōgo|Toyooka City]], Hyōgo Prefecture. It is a Shikinaisha Myōjin Taisha and a former {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社|lt=Sonsha}}. * {{ill|Kaijin Shrine (Kinokawa)|ja|海神社 (紀の川市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kinokawa, Wakayama|ja|紀の川市}}, [[Wakayama Prefecture]]. It is a former {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社|lt=Kensha}}. * {{ill|Kaijin Shrine (Nishinoshima)|ja|海神社 (西ノ島町)}} - Located in {{ill|Nishinoshima, Shimane|ja|西ノ島町}}, [[Oki District]], [[Shimane Prefecture]]. It is a Shikinaisha Shōsha (minor shrine) and a former Village Shrine. * {{ill|Kaijin Shrine (Iki)|ja|海神社 (壱岐市)}} - Located in [[Iki, Nagasaki|Iki City]], [[Nagasaki Prefecture]]. It is a Shikinaisha Taisha and a former Village Shrine.
Watatsumi Shrine can refer to the following
* [[Watatsumi Shrine_(Kobe)|Watatsumi Shrines]][[Category:shrine disambiguations]] * [[Watazumi Shrines]][[Category:shrine disambiguations]] sometimes read as Watatsumi Shrine * [[Kaijin Shrines]][[Category:shrine disambiguations]] sometimes read as Watatsumi Shrine * Another shrine to [[Watatsumi]]
== Other shrines ==
* {{ill|Kaido Shrine|ja|海童神社}} - known for its whalebone torii, Located in {{ill|Kawasoemachi|ja|川副町}}, [[Saga District, Saga|Saga District]], [[Saga Prefecture]]. Former Gōsha.

Former Village Shrine. * {{ill|Kaitomi Shrine|ja|海都見神社}} - Located in {{ill|Yusuhara, Kōchi|ja|檮原町}}, [[Takaoka District, Kōchi|Takaoka District]], [[Kōchi Prefecture]]. The main shrine of Watatsumi is [[Shikaumi Shrines]] the ancestral shrine of the [[Azumi people]]
'''Kaijin Shrine''' (海神社, also read as Amajinja, Kaijinja, or Watatsumijinja) refers to various [[Shrine|Shinto shrines]]:
* [[Watatsumi Shrine_(Kobe)|Watatsumi Shrines]] - Located in {{ill|Tarumi-ku, Kobe|ja|垂水区|12=draft}}, [[Kobe]], [[Hyōgo Prefecture]]. It is a {{ill|Myōjin Taisha|ja|名神大社|lt=Shikinaisha Myōjin Taisha|12=draft}} and a former {{ill|Kanpeichūsha|ja|官幣中社|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Kaijin Shrine (Toyooka)|ja|海神社 (豊岡市)|12=draft}} - Located in [[Toyooka, Hyōgo|Toyooka City]], Hyōgo Prefecture. It is a Shikinaisha Myōjin Taisha and a former {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社|lt=Sonsha|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Kaijin Shrine (Kinokawa)|ja|海神社 (紀の川市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Kinokawa, Wakayama|ja|紀の川市|12=draft}}, [[Wakayama Prefecture]]. It is a former {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社|lt=Kensha|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Kaijin Shrine (Nishinoshima)|ja|海神社 (西ノ島町)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Nishinoshima, Shimane|ja|西ノ島町|12=draft}}, [[Oki District]], [[Shimane Prefecture]]. It is a Shikinaisha Shōsha (minor shrine) and a former Village Shrine. * {{ill|Kaijin Shrine (Iki)|ja|海神社 (壱岐市)|12=draft}} - Located in [[Iki, Nagasaki|Iki City]], [[Nagasaki Prefecture]]. It is a Shikinaisha Taisha and a former Village Shrine.
Watatsumi Shrine can refer to the following
* [[Watatsumi Shrine_(Kobe)|Watatsumi Shrines]] * [[Watazumi Shrines]] sometimes read as Watatsumi Shrine * [[Kaijin Shrines]] sometimes read as Watatsumi Shrine * Another shrine to [[Watatsumi]]
== Other shrines ==
* {{ill|Kaido Shrine|ja|海童神社|12=draft}} - known for its whalebone torii, Located in {{ill|Kawasoemachi|ja|川副町|12=draft}}, [[Saga District, Saga|Saga District]], [[Saga Prefecture]]. Former Gōsha.
== Related Articles == There are also shrines with similar names, such as '''Kaijin Shrine''' and '''Watatsumi Shrine''' (綿津見神社, Watatsumijinja). * * {{ill|Kaizumi Shrine|ja|海積神社|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Okazaki, Aichi|ja|岡崎市|12=draft}}, [[Aichi Prefecture]]. Former Village Shrine. * {{ill|Kaitomi Shrine|ja|海都見神社|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Yusuhara, Kōchi|ja|檮原町|12=draft}}, [[Takaoka District, Kōchi|Takaoka District]], [[Kōchi Prefecture]]. Former Gōsha (district shrine). *

The main shrine of Watatsumi is [[Shikaumi Shrines]] the ancestral shrine of the [[Azumi people]]
'''Kaijin Shrine''' (海神社, also read as Amajinja, Kaijinja, or Watatsumijinja) refers to various [[Shrine|Shinto shrines]]:
* [[Watatsumi Shrine_(Kobe)|Watatsumi Shrines]] - Located in [[:en:Tarumi-ku, Kobe|Tarumi-ku, Kobe]], [[Kobe]], [[Hyōgo Prefecture]]. It is a {{ill|Myōjin Taisha|ja|名神大社|lt=Shikinaisha Myōjin Taisha|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōjin Taisha|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} and a former {{ill|Kanpeichūsha|ja|官幣中社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanpeichūsha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度}}. * {{ill|Kaijin Shrine (Toyooka)|ja|海神社 (豊岡市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaijin Shrine (Toyooka)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[Toyooka, Hyōgo|Toyooka City]], Hyōgo Prefecture. It is a Shikinaisha Myōjin Taisha and a former {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社|lt=Sonsha|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度}}. * {{ill|Kaijin Shrine (Kinokawa)|ja|海神社 (紀の川市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaijin Shrine (Kinokawa)|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Kinokawa, Wakayama|Kinokawa, Wakayama]], [[Wakayama Prefecture]]. It is a former {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社|lt=Kensha|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度}}. * {{ill|Kaijin Shrine (Nishinoshima)|ja|海神社 (西ノ島町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaijin Shrine (Nishinoshima)|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Nishinoshima, Shimane|Nishinoshima, Shimane]], [[Oki District]], [[Shimane Prefecture]]. It is a Shikinaisha Shōsha (minor shrine) and a former Village Shrine. * {{ill|Kaijin Shrine (Iki)|ja|海神社 (壱岐市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaijin Shrine (Iki)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[Iki, Nagasaki|Iki City]], [[Nagasaki Prefecture]]. It is a Shikinaisha Taisha and a former Village Shrine.
Watatsumi Shrine can refer to the following
* [[Watatsumi Shrine_(Kobe)|Watatsumi Shrines]] * [[Watazumi Shrines]] sometimes read as Watatsumi Shrine * [[Kaijin Shrines]] sometimes read as Watatsumi Shrine * Another shrine to [[Watatsumi]]
== Other shrines ==
* {{ill|Kaido Shrine|ja|海童神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaido Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 海童神社 (新上五島町)}} - known for its whalebone torii, Located in [[:en:Kawasoe, Saga|Kawasoemachi]], [[Saga District, Saga|Saga District]], [[Saga Prefecture]]. Former Gō-sha.
== Related Articles == There are also shrines with similar names, such as '''Kaijin Shrine''' and '''Watatsumi Shrine''' (綿津見神社, Watatsumijinja). * * {{ill|Kaizumi Shrine|ja|海積神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaizumi Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[:en:Okazaki, Aichi|Okazaki, Aichi]], [[Aichi Prefecture]]. Former Village Shrine. * {{ill|Kaitomi Shrine|ja|海都見神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaitomi Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[:en:Yusuhara|Yusuhara, Kōchi]], [[Takaoka District, Kōchi|Takaoka District]], [[Kōchi Prefecture]]. Former Gō-sha (district shrine). *

The main shrine of Watatsumi is [[Shikaumi Shrines]] the ancestral shrine of the [[Azumi people]]
'''Kaijin Shrine''' (海神社, also read as Amajinja, Kaijinja, or Watatsumijinja) refers to various [[Shrine|Shinto shrines]]:
* [[Watatsumi Shrine_(Kobe)|Watatsumi Shrines]] - Located in [[:en:Tarumi-ku, Kobe|Tarumi-ku, Kobe]], [[Kobe]], [[Hyōgo Prefecture]]. It is a {{ill|Myōjin Taisha|ja|名神大社|lt=Shikinaisha Myōjin Taisha|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōjin Taisha|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} and a former {{ill|Kanpeichūsha|ja|官幣中社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanpeichūsha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度}}. * {{ill|Kaijin Shrine (Toyooka)|ja|海神社 (豊岡市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaijin Shrine (Toyooka)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[Toyooka, Hyōgo|Toyooka City]], Hyōgo Prefecture. It is a Shikinaisha Myōjin Taisha and a former {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社|lt=Son-sha|1=Modern_system_of_ranked_Shinto_shrines#Village_shrines|lt=Sonsha|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度}}. * {{ill|Kaijin Shrine (Kinokawa)|ja|海神社 (紀の川市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaijin Shrine (Kinokawa)|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Kinokawa, Wakayama|Kinokawa, Wakayama]], [[Wakayama Prefecture]]. It is a former {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社|lt=Ken-sha|1=Modern_system_of_ranked_Shinto_shrines#Metropolitan_and_Prefectural_Shrines|lt=Kensha|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度}}. * {{ill|Kaijin Shrine (Nishinoshima)|ja|海神社 (西ノ島町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaijin Shrine (Nishinoshima)|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Nishinoshima, Shimane|Nishinoshima, Shimane]], [[Oki District]], [[Shimane Prefecture]]. It is a Shikinaisha Shōsha (minor shrine) and a former Village Shrine. * {{ill|Kaijin Shrine (Iki)|ja|海神社 (壱岐市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaijin Shrine (Iki)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[Iki, Nagasaki|Iki City]], [[Nagasaki Prefecture]]. It is a Shikinaisha Taisha and a former Village Shrine.
Watatsumi Shrine can refer to the following
* [[Watatsumi Shrine_(Kobe)|Watatsumi Shrines]] * [[Watazumi Shrines]] sometimes read as Watatsumi Shrine * [[Kaijin Shrines]] sometimes read as Watatsumi Shrine * Another shrine to [[Watatsumi]]
== Other shrines ==
* {{ill|Kaido Shrine|ja|海童神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaido Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 海童神社 (新上五島町)}} - known for its whalebone torii, Located in [[:en:Kawasoe, Saga|Kawasoemachi]], [[Saga District, Saga|Saga District]], [[Saga Prefecture]]. Former Gō-sha.
== Related Articles == There are also shrines with similar names, such as '''Kaijin Shrine''' and '''Watatsumi Shrine''' (綿津見神社, Watatsumijinja). * * {{ill|Kaizumi Shrine|ja|海積神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaizumi Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[:en:Okazaki, Aichi|Okazaki, Aichi]], [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]]. Former Village Shrine. * {{ill|Kaitomi Shrine|ja|海都見神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaitomi Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[:en:Yusuhara|Yusuhara, Kōchi]], [[Takaoka District, Kōchi|Takaoka District]], [[Kōchi Prefecture]]. Former Gō-sha (district shrine). *

'''Kaijin Shrine''' (海神社, also read as Amajinja, Kaijinja, or Watatsumijinja) refers to various [[Shrine|Shinto shrines]]:
* [[Watatsumi Shrine_(Kobe)|Watatsumi Shrines]] - Located in [[:en:Tarumi-ku, Kobe|Tarumi-ku, Kobe]], [[:en:Kobe|Kobe]], [[:en:Hyōgo Prefecture|Hyōgo Prefecture]]. It is a former {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Kensha|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}. * {{ill|Kaijin Shrine (Nishinoshima)|ja|海神社 (西ノ島町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaijin Shrine (Nishinoshima)|qq=|1=Kaijin Shrine (Nishinoshima)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11559097}} - Located in [[:en:Nishinoshima, Shimane|Nishinoshima, Shimane]], [[:en:Oki District|Oki District]], [[:en:Shimane Prefecture|Shimane Prefecture]]. It is a Shikinaisha Shōsha (minor shrine) and a former Village Shrine. * {{ill|Kaijin Shrine (Iki)|ja|海神社 (壱岐市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaijin Shrine (Iki)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[:en:Iki, Nagasaki|Iki City]], [[:en:Nagasaki Prefecture|Nagasaki Prefecture]]. It is a Shikinaisha Taisha and a former Village Shrine.

* [[Watatsumi Shrine_(Kobe)|Watatsumi Shrines]] * [[Watazumi Shrines]] sometimes read as Watatsumi Shrine * [[Kaijin Shrines]] sometimes read as Watatsumi Shrine * Another shrine to [[:en:Watatsumi|Watatsumi]]

'''Kaijin Shrine''' (海神社, also read as Amajinja, Kaijinja, or Watatsumijinja) refers to various [[Shrine|Shinto shrines]]:

It is a Shikinaisha Shōsha (minor shrine) and a former Village Shrine. * {{ill|Kaijin Shrine (Iki)|ja|海神社 (壱岐市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaijin Shrine (Iki)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[:en:Iki, Nagasaki|Iki City]], [[:en:Nagasaki Prefecture|Nagasaki Prefecture]]. It is a Shikinaisha Taisha and a former Village Shrine.

It is a {{ill|Myōjin Taisha|ja|名神大社|lt=Shikinaisha Myōjin Taisha|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōjin Taisha|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} and a former {{ill|Kanpeichūsha|ja|官幣中社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanpeichūsha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}. * {{ill|Kaijin Shrine (Toyooka)|ja|海神社 (豊岡市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaijin Shrine (Toyooka)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[:en:Toyooka, Hyōgo|Toyooka City]], Hyōgo Prefecture. It is a former {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社|1=Prefectural Shrine|WD=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Kensha|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}. * {{ill|Kaijin Shrine (Nishinoshima)|ja|海神社 (西ノ島町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaijin Shrine (Nishinoshima)|1=Kai Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11559097}} - Located in [[:en:Nishinoshima, Shimane|Nishinoshima, Shimane]], [[:en:Oki District|Oki District]], [[:en:Shimane Prefecture|Shimane Prefecture]]. It is a Shikinaisha Shōsha (minor shrine) and a former Village Shrine. * {{ill|Kaijin Shrine (Iki)|ja|海神社 (壱岐市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaijin Shrine (Iki)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[:en:Iki, Nagasaki|Iki City]], [[:en:Nagasaki Prefecture|Nagasaki Prefecture]]. It is a Shikinaisha Taisha and a former Village Shrine.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Watatsumi Shrine]][[ja:海神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q123530063]] Wikidata name: Watatsumi Shrine [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:21, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} The main shrine of Watatsumi is [[Shikaumi Shrines]] the ancestral shrine of the [[Azumi people]]
'''Kaijin Shrine''' (海神社, also read as Amajinja, Kaijinja, or Watatsumijinja) refers to various [[Shrine|Shinto shrines]]:
* [[Watatsumi Shrine_(Kobe)|Watatsumi Shrines]] - Located in [[:en:Tarumi-ku, Kobe|Tarumi-ku, Kobe]], [[:en:Kobe|Kobe]], [[:en:Hyōgo Prefecture|Hyōgo Prefecture]]. It is a {{ill|Myōjin Taisha|ja|名神大社|lt=Shikinaisha Myōjin Taisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōjin Taisha|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} and a former {{ill|Kanpeichūsha|ja|官幣中社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanpeichūsha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}. * {{ill|Kaijin Shrine (Toyooka)|ja|海神社 (豊岡市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaijin Shrine (Toyooka)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[:en:Toyooka, Hyōgo|Toyooka City]], Hyōgo Prefecture. It is a Shikinaisha Myōjin Taisha and a former {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|WD=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Sonsha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}. * {{ill|Kaijin Shrine (Kinokawa)|ja|海神社 (紀の川市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaijin Shrine (Kinokawa)|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Kinokawa, Wakayama|Kinokawa, Wakayama]], [[:en:Wakayama Prefecture|Wakayama Prefecture]]. It is a former {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社|1=Prefectural Shrine|WD=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Kensha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}. * {{ill|Kaijin Shrine (Nishinoshima)|ja|海神社 (西ノ島町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaijin Shrine (Nishinoshima)|1=Kai Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11559097}} - Located in [[:en:Nishinoshima, Shimane|Nishinoshima, Shimane]], [[:en:Oki District|Oki District]], [[:en:Shimane Prefecture|Shimane Prefecture]]. It is a Shikinaisha Shōsha (minor shrine) and a former Village Shrine. * {{ill|Kaijin Shrine (Iki)|ja|海神社 (壱岐市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaijin Shrine (Iki)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[:en:Iki, Nagasaki|Iki City]], [[:en:Nagasaki Prefecture|Nagasaki Prefecture]]. It is a Shikinaisha Taisha and a former Village Shrine.
Watatsumi Shrine can refer to the following
* [[Watatsumi Shrine_(Kobe)|Watatsumi Shrines]] * [[Watazumi Shrines]] sometimes read as Watatsumi Shrine * [[Kaijin Shrines]] sometimes read as Watatsumi Shrine * Another shrine to [[:en:Watatsumi|Watatsumi]]
== Other shrines ==
* {{ill|Kaido Shrine|ja|海童神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaido Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 海童神社 (新上五島町)}} - known for its whalebone torii, Located in [[:en:Kawasoe, Saga|Kawasoemachi]], [[:en:Saga District, Saga|Saga District]], [[:en:Saga Prefecture|Saga Prefecture]]. Former Gō-sha.
== Related Articles == There are also shrines with similar names, such as '''Kaijin Shrine''' and '''Watatsumi Shrine''' (綿津見神社, Watatsumijinja). * * {{ill|Kaizumi Shrine|ja|海積神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaizumi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[:en:Okazaki, Aichi|Okazaki, Aichi]], [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]]. Former Village Shrine. * {{ill|Kaitomi Shrine|ja|海都見神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaitomi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[:en:Yusuhara|Yusuhara, Kōchi]], [[:en:Takaoka District, Kōchi|Takaoka District]], [[:en:Kōchi Prefecture|Kōchi Prefecture]]. Former Gō-sha (district shrine). *

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Watatsumi Shrine]][[ja:海神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q123530063]] Wikidata name: Watatsumi Shrine [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:21, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} The main shrine of Watatsumi is [[Shikaumi Shrines]] the ancestral shrine of the [[Azumi people]]
'''Kaijin Shrine''' (海神社, also read as Amajinja, Kaijinja, or Watatsumijinja) refers to various [[Shrine|Shinto shrines]]:
* [[Watatsumi Shrine_(Kobe)|Watatsumi Shrines]] - Located in [[:en:Tarumi-ku, Kobe|Tarumi-ku, Kobe]], [[:en:Kobe|Kobe]], [[:en:Hyōgo Prefecture|Hyōgo Prefecture]]. It is a {{ill|Myōjin Taisha|ja|名神大社|lt=Shikinaisha Myōjin Taisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōjin Taisha|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} and a former {{ill|Kanpeichūsha|ja|官幣中社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanpeichūsha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}. * {{ill|Kaijin Shrine (Toyooka)|ja|海神社 (豊岡市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaijin Shrine (Toyooka)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[:en:Toyooka, Hyōgo|Toyooka City]], Hyōgo Prefecture. It is a Shikinaisha Myōjin Taisha and a former {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|WD=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Sonsha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}. * {{ill|Kaijin Shrine (Kinokawa)|ja|海神社 (紀の川市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaijin Shrine (Kinokawa)|qq=}} - Located in [[:en:Kinokawa, Wakayama|Kinokawa, Wakayama]], [[:en:Wakayama Prefecture|Wakayama Prefecture]]. It is a former {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社|1=Prefectural Shrine|WD=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Kensha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}. * {{ill|Kaijin Shrine (Nishinoshima)|ja|海神社 (西ノ島町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaijin Shrine (Nishinoshima)|1=Kai Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11559097}} - Located in [[:en:Nishinoshima, Shimane|Nishinoshima, Shimane]], [[:en:Oki District|Oki District]], [[:en:Shimane Prefecture|Shimane Prefecture]]. It is a Shikinaisha Shōsha (minor shrine) and a former Village Shrine. * {{ill|Kaijin Shrine (Iki)|ja|海神社 (壱岐市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaijin Shrine (Iki)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[:en:Iki, Nagasaki|Iki City]], [[:en:Nagasaki Prefecture|Nagasaki Prefecture]]. It is a Shikinaisha Taisha and a former Village Shrine.
Watatsumi Shrine can refer to the following
* [[Watatsumi Shrine_(Kobe)|Watatsumi Shrines]] * [[Watazumi Shrines]] sometimes read as Watatsumi Shrine * [[Kaijin Shrines]] sometimes read as Watatsumi Shrine * Another shrine to [[:en:Watatsumi|Watatsumi]]
== Other shrines ==
* {{ill|Kaido Shrine|ja|海童神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaido Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 海童神社 (新上五島町)}} - known for its whalebone torii, Located in [[:en:Kawasoe, Saga|Kawasoemachi]], [[:en:Saga District, Saga|Saga District]], [[:en:Saga Prefecture|Saga Prefecture]]. Former Gō-sha.
== Related Articles == There are also shrines with similar names, such as '''Kaijin Shrine''' and '''Watatsumi Shrine''' (綿津見神社, Watatsumijinja). * * {{ill|Kaizumi Shrine|ja|海積神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaizumi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[:en:Okazaki, Aichi|Okazaki, Aichi]], [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]]. Former Village Shrine. * {{ill|Kaitomi Shrine|ja|海都見神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaitomi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[:en:Yusuhara|Yusuhara, Kōchi]], [[:en:Takaoka District, Kōchi|Takaoka District]], [[:en:Kōchi Prefecture|Kōchi Prefecture]]. Former Gō-sha (district shrine). *

'''Kaijin Shrine''' (海神社, also read as Amajinja, Kaijinja, or Watatsumijinja) refers to various [[Shrine|Shinto shrines]]:
* [[Watatsumi Shrine_(Kobe)|Watatsumi Shrines]] - Located in [[:en:Tarumi-ku, Kobe|Tarumi-ku, Kobe]], [[:en:Kobe|Kobe]], [[:en:Hyōgo Prefecture|Hyōgo Prefecture]]. It is a former {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社|1=Prefectural Shrine|WD=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Kensha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}. * {{ill|Kaijin Shrine (Nishinoshima)|ja|海神社 (西ノ島町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaijin Shrine (Nishinoshima)|1=Kai Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11559097}} - Located in [[:en:Nishinoshima, Shimane|Nishinoshima, Shimane]], [[:en:Oki District|Oki District]], [[:en:Shimane Prefecture|Shimane Prefecture]]. It is a Shikinaisha Shōsha (minor shrine) and a former Village Shrine. * {{ill|Kaijin Shrine (Iki)|ja|海神社 (壱岐市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaijin Shrine (Iki)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[:en:Iki, Nagasaki|Iki City]], [[:en:Nagasaki Prefecture|Nagasaki Prefecture]]. It is a Shikinaisha Taisha and a former Village Shrine.
Watatsumi Shrine can refer to the following
* [[Watatsumi Shrine_(Kobe)|Watatsumi Shrines]] * [[Watazumi Shrines]] sometimes read as Watatsumi Shrine * [[Kaijin Shrines]] sometimes read as Watatsumi Shrine * Another shrine to [[:en:Watatsumi|Watatsumi]]
== Other shrines ==

Former Village Shrine. * {{ill|Kaitomi Shrine|ja|海都見神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaitomi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in [[:en:Yusuhara|Yusuhara, Kōchi]], [[:en:Takaoka District, Kōchi|Takaoka District]], [[:en:Kōchi Prefecture|Kōchi Prefecture]]. Watatsumi Shrine can refer to the following

== Other shrines ==

Former Gō-sha.

The main shrine of Watatsumi is [[Shikaumi Shrines]] the ancestral shrine of the [[Azumi people]]
'''Kaijin Shrine''' (海神社, also read as Amajinja, Kaijinja, or Watatsumijinja) refers to various [[Shrine|Shinto shrines]]:
* [[Watatsumi Shrine_(Kobe)|Watatsumi Shrines]] - Located in {{ill|Tarumi-ku, Kobe|en|Tarumi-ku, Kobe|WD=Q1078806|lt=Tarumi-ku, Kobe|1=Tarumi-ku, Kobe}}, {{ill|Kobe|en|Kobe|WD=Q48320|lt=Kobe|1=Kobe}}, {{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture|en|Hyōgo Prefecture|WD=Q130290|lt=Hyōgo Prefecture|1=Hyōgo Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|Myōjin Taisha|ja|名神大社|lt=Shikinaisha Myōjin Taisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōjin Taisha|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} and a former {{ill|Kanpeichūsha|ja|官幣中社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanpeichūsha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}. * {{ill|Kaijin Shrine (Toyooka)|ja|海神社 (豊岡市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaijin Shrine (Toyooka)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in {{ill|Toyooka, Hyōgo|en|Toyooka, Hyōgo|WD=Q696388|lt=Toyooka City|1=Toyooka, Hyōgo}}, Hyōgo Prefecture. It is a Shikinaisha Myōjin Taisha and a former {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|WD=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Sonsha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}. * {{ill|Kaijin Shrine (Kinokawa)|ja|海神社 (紀の川市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaijin Shrine (Kinokawa)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Kinokawa, Wakayama|en|Kinokawa, Wakayama|WD=Q697002|lt=Kinokawa, Wakayama|1=Kinokawa, Wakayama}}, {{ill|Wakayama Prefecture|en|Wakayama Prefecture|WD=Q131314|lt=Wakayama Prefecture|1=Wakayama Prefecture}}. It is a former {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社|1=Ken-sha|WD=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|WD=Q90139226|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|lt=Kensha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}. * {{ill|Kaijin Shrine (Nishinoshima)|ja|海神社 (西ノ島町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaijin Shrine (Nishinoshima)|1=Kai Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11559097}} - Located in {{ill|Nishinoshima, Shimane|en|Nishinoshima, Shimane|WD=Q543193|lt=Nishinoshima, Shimane|1=Nishinoshima, Shimane}}, [[:en:Oki District|Oki District]], {{ill|Shimane Prefecture|en|Shimane Prefecture|WD=Q132751|lt=Shimane Prefecture|1=Shimane Prefecture}}. It is a Shikinaisha Shōsha (minor shrine) and a former Village Shrine. * {{ill|Kaijin Shrine (Iki)|ja|海神社 (壱岐市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaijin Shrine (Iki)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in {{ill|Iki, Nagasaki|en|Iki, Nagasaki|WD=Q861519|lt=Iki City|1=Iki, Nagasaki}}, {{ill|Nagasaki Prefecture|en|Nagasaki Prefecture|WD=Q169376|lt=Nagasaki Prefecture|1=Nagasaki Prefecture}}. It is a Shikinaisha Taisha and a former Village Shrine.
Watatsumi Shrine can refer to the following
* [[Watatsumi Shrine_(Kobe)|Watatsumi Shrines]] * [[Watazumi Shrines]] sometimes read as Watatsumi Shrine * [[Kaijin Shrines]] sometimes read as Watatsumi Shrine * Another shrine to {{ill|Watatsumi|en|Watatsumi|WD=Q1474187|lt=Watatsumi|1=Watatsumi}}

* {{ill|Kaido Shrine|ja|海童神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaido Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 海童神社 (新上五島町)}} - known for its whalebone torii, Located in {{ill|Kawasoe, Saga|en|Kawasoe, Saga|WD=Q6379877|lt=Kawasoemachi|1=Kawasoe, Saga}}, {{ill|Saga District, Saga|en|Saga District, Saga|WD=Q1049340|lt=Saga District|1=Saga District, Saga}}, {{ill|Saga Prefecture|en|Saga Prefecture|WD=Q160420|lt=Saga Prefecture|1=Saga Prefecture}}. Former Gō-sha.
== Related Articles == There are also shrines with similar names, such as '''Kaijin Shrine''' and '''Watatsumi Shrine''' (綿津見神社, Watatsumijinja). * * {{ill|Kaizumi Shrine|ja|海積神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaizumi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in {{ill|Okazaki, Aichi|en|Okazaki, Aichi|WD=Q242783|lt=Okazaki, Aichi|1=Okazaki, Aichi}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture|1=Aichi Prefecture}}. Former Village Shrine. * {{ill|Kaitomi Shrine|ja|海都見神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaitomi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in {{ill|Yusuhara|en|Yusuhara|WD=Q1206286|lt=Yusuhara, Kōchi|1=Yusuhara}}, {{ill|Takaoka District, Kōchi|en|Takaoka District, Kōchi|WD=Q736755|lt=Takaoka District|1=Takaoka District, Kōchi}}, {{ill|Kōchi Prefecture|en|Kōchi Prefecture|WD=Q134093|lt=Kōchi Prefecture|1=Kōchi Prefecture}}. Former Gō-sha (district shrine). *
